name: devconnect
description: A professional platform for developers to showcase portfolios, collaborate on projects, and build their professional network.
author: Owais Ahmad Shah

scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:shared:barrels & pnpm run -r dev
scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:client && pnpm run build:server
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter client lint && pnpm --filter server lint
